description: LED animation library specification for Arcade Assistant

blink.name: Blink
blink.description: Flashes a color on and off

speed.description: Duration of one full on/off cycle in seconds

pulse.name: Pulse
pulse.description: Smoothly fades a color in and out (breathing effect)

speed.description: Duration of one full fade cycle in seconds

pulse.implementation: Use cosine function for smooth, natural breathing effect

size.description: Number of lit LEDs in block

comet.name: Comet
comet.description: Pixel moves along strip with fading tail

tail_length.description: Length of fading tail in pixels

comet.implementation: Tail created by progressively dimming pixels behind head

rainbow.name: Rainbow

speed.description: Speed of rainbow movement in seconds

period.description: Distance in pixels for pattern repeat

rainbow.implementation: Use HSV-to-RGB, increment Hue over time

sparkle.name: Sparkle
sparkle.description: Random pixels flash and fade out

speed.description: Average time between sparkles in seconds

implementation_notes: Each animation should be a class with animate() method called on frame update
Support animation groups for multi-zone control
Hardware animations (PacLED64 fade, LED-Wiz pulse modes) should offload to device when possible
